mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medicine(medicine_name, spec, stock, unit, price, produce_date, expire_date, status, is_deleted) VALUES(#{medicineName}, #{spec}, #{stock}, #{unit}, #{price}, #{produceDate}, #{expireDate}, #{status}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE medicine
medicine_name = #{medicineName}, spec = #{spec}, stock = #{stock}, unit = #{unit}, price = #{price}, produce_date = #{produceDate}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE medicine SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE medicine SET stock = #{stock} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM medicine WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM medicine WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM medicine WHERE medicine_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{medicineName}, '%') AND is_deleted = 0
